data.title: Avalanche Faces Heavy Selloff in November — Here Is How the Granite Upgrade Tries to Flip the Script
data.description:
In November, Avalanche experienced a significant downturn in market activity, leading to a heavy selloff as investors reacted to various factors affecting the cryptocurrency landscape. However, the upcoming Granite upgrade aims to revitalize the platform by introducing innovative features and improvements that could potentially reverse the current trend and restore confidence among traders and users alike. This strategic enhancement may be the key to turning the tide and revitalizing Avalanche's position in the competitive crypto market.
source: https://blocknews.com/avalanche-faces-heavy-selloff-in-november-here-is-how-the-granite-upgrade-tries-to-flip-the-script/

data.title: Samourai Wallet co-founder William Lonergan Hill sentenced to four years in crypto mixing service case
data.description:
Samourai Wallet co-founder William Lonergan Hill was sentenced to four years in prison for his role in operating a crypto mixing service.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/379568/samourai-wallet-co-founder-william-lonergan-hill-sentenced-to-four-years-in-crypto-mixing-service-case?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: WLFI Addresses Wallet Breach, Begins Secure Fund Reallocations
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has issued a detailed update following a pre-launch security incident that affected a small subset of user wallets. The company confirmed that attackers accessed these wallets through external phishing and third-party security lapses, not through any flaw in WLFI’s platform or smart contracts.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wlfi-addresses-wallet-breach-begins-secure-fund-reallocations/

data.title: Why Bitcoin’s Latest Dip Has Supercharged Demand for Crypto Retirement Accounts
data.description:
Recent Bitcoin (BTC) price swings have been unsettling for short-term traders, prompting some to question whether the market is undergoing a temporary correction or entering a prolonged downturn. However, for long-term retirement investors—particularly those using Bitcoin IRAs—price dips can offer strategic entry points rather than reasons for concern. Jonathan Rose, CEO of BlockTrust IRA, told Cryptonews […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/why-market-pullbacks-are-the-best-time-to-add-bitcoin-to-retirement-accounts/

data.title: BTC miners just flipped from dumping to hoarding
data.description:
Bitcoin miners spent the first half of November unloading coins into a falling market, but now it appears that they have quietly changed their course. On-chain data shows that miner wallets have shifted from net distribution back into net accumulation. This somehow suggests that forced selling has passed. BTC has slid almost 30% from its […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/btc-miners-just-flipped-from-dumping-to-hoarding/

data.title: Coinbase to roll out its new ‘DeFi Mullet’ offering in Brazil
data.description:
Coinbase is rolling out its DEX trading platform to Brazil about six weeks after it launched in the US, offering Brazilians over 10,000 tokens to trade without leaving Coinbase’s app.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/coinbase-expand-dex-trading-defi-mullet-brazil?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase Expands Into Brazil With New DEX Trading Feature
data.description:
Coinbase is deepening its presence in Latin America with the rollout of decentralized exchange (DEX) trading for users in Brazil. Announced on November 19, 2025, the launch marks a major milestone in the company’s push toward an “everything app” model, arriving just as Brazil’s central bank implements a new regulatory framework for digital assets.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/coinbase-expands-into-brazil-with-new-dex-trading-feature/

data.description:

This follows the recent launch of its Canary Capital ETF, which gained about $57 million in volume on the first day of trading. These two developments suggest XRP is moving beyond its traditional payments niche and into a broader investment […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-considers-xrp-staking-defi-etfs/

data.title: Cancer Diagnosis Helps Keep Jack Abramoff Out of Prison for 'AML Bitcoin' Fraud Scheme
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/349254/cancer-diagnosis-jack-abramoff-prison-aml-bitcoin-fraud-scheme
